about_title: VALMARI LEADING TRAINING CENTER OF AESTHETIC COSMETOLOGY
about_desc_2: Leading training center of aesthetic cosmetology.
about_desc_3: For more than 5 years we have been conducting certified professional education courses in the field of cosmetology and the beauty, health, and youth industry.

modelsSection.title: WE ARE RECRUITING MODELS
modelsSection.subTitle: We offer our services for models.
modelsSection.description: Choose a procedure or several procedures, and our manager will advise you and provide the closest date when you can receive this procedure.

masterClasses.title: Master Classes
masterClasses.subtitle: Events for advanced training of cosmetologists

card1.title: 10 capabilities of neodymium laser. Laser peeling, tattoo/permanent makeup removal

card2.title: Cosmetologist profession. Seminar for beginners and professionals
card2.speakersNames: Marina Spivak, Alina Yadchishina, Elena Belogurova, Yulia Shchukina

card1.title: Teachers
card1.text: Our teachers have many years of experience in the field of cosmetology and combine teaching activities with practical work in beauty salons and other specialized centers.

card2.title: Certificates
card2.text: The diploma, certificate, and testimonial obtained from us upon completion of the courses act as the best "recommendation" when applying for a job.

card3.title: Advanced Training
card3.text: Every year, more than 2000 cosmetologists upgrade their qualifications and level of professionalism in the spacious rooms of our center.
